summary: Vitest gate passed: 14/14 files, 93/93 tests. Spot-check `kanban`: `saveCardCAS` compares on-disk `rev` before atomic write and `processCard` CAS-acquires/runs/saves, so stale-rev rejection is real. Spot-check `gateway-routing`: `preRoute` honors explicit classifications only when `taskType` and `tier` are in router vocab, otherwise falls back to `classify(message)`, so both honored and out-of-vocab fallback assertions hit real routing logic. Spot-check `mode-bias`: `biasRole` actually lowers `standard` to `fast` for Gary via `standard-toward-fast` while preserving `expert`, matching `modes.json`. Spot-check `orchestrator-placement`: `placeOrchestratedSession` rejects unsafe mode ids with `/^[a-z0-9_-]+$/` and path confinement before writing, so the traversal-null test is substantive. Spot-check `warm-pool-single`: the real `MultiRuntimePool` warms one pool per runtime id, and gateway wiring instantiates exactly `operative` primary plus `classifier` secondary, so the single generic operative pool assertion is meaningful.
steps: exec_command: `for f in PRD.md PLANING.md TASKS.md; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then echo "FOUND $f"; else echo "MISSING $f"; fi; done`

exec_command: `npx vitest run tests/routing-assembly.test.ts tests/modes-fitting.test.ts tests/souls-assembly.test.ts tests/mode-resolver.test.ts tests/mode-bias.test.ts tests/warm-pool-single.test.ts tests/orchestrator-placement.test.ts tests/devenv-orchestrated-command.test.ts tests/devenv-session-request.test.ts tests/discipline-skills.test.ts tests/workflow-target.test.ts tests/improver-routed-dream.test.ts tests/kanban.test.ts tests/gateway-routing.test.ts`
write_stdin: poll test session to completion
